rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (4/10) and rest on the same substantive concerns: Basic German against a hard C1 requirement, no formal team-leadership or Head/Tech-Lead experience, and missing Python/UML. The wording shifts (e.g. 'craftsman-level engineer') and the added mention of teaching/public speaking are ordinary run-to-run rephrasings, not penalties tied to the candidate's location. Nothing in the variant references Bucharest, Romania, or otherwise keys off the relocation from Berlin.
